result: Implementation complete: `model/model.py` gained `RECON_SIZE`/`LAMBDA_RECON` constants, the `ReconDecoder` class + `build_recon_decoder()`, and `TinyLocNet.forward`'s new `return_feat` flag exposing the identity-turn feature map. `model/train.py` now loads the daytime reference raster once per area, `sample_epoch` returns pixel-aligned 64×64 daytime targets alongside the existing crops, and the training loop adds the decoder as a third `1e-3` param group plus the weighted L1 reconstruction loss. Export, calibration, and the CLI/ONNX contract are untouched, and `model.train`/`model.model` both import cleanly.

tool_input.command: wc -l /workspace/low-light-geolocalization-autoresearch/runs/pending_experiment.json; awk '{print length, NR}' /workspace/low-light-geolocalization-autoresearch/runs/pending_experiment.json | sort -rn | head -5
